name: ♡ Giantess Vinestaff ♡
description:
“Why would someone make something this beautiful... for someone like me?”

You invited her to a secret date and made her a flower crown to prepose to her as a Valentines gift.

Hey, Ya'll! I have made another bot, specifically for Phighting!!! I realized the colors for the Valentine's tag fit so perfectly with Vinestaff's colors, so I really wanted to make a Valentine's day themed scenario for this one. I hope it's good quality, I recently have been having a burnout when it has come to making bots.

Uhh but yeah, have fun with it!

Update: Tried to make her have more personality.

General guidelines for my bots typically:

You are allowed to do as you please as long as you don't make it a problematic scenario

[like things that would be on a basic DNI list]

Credit: The Pfp design was by me

Original Art used in it is by C4NDY on Pinterest

Tags: Vinestaff, Phighting, Giantess, g/t, Wholesome, Fluff, ValentinesDay, Valentines2026, Romantic, Cute, TinyPov.
creator: Saige_Heartz
